rationale: For an admin-level restaurant POS order reports dashboard, absolute clarity and rapid scanning are essential. The existing POS sidebar is dark, so a stark, bright, high-contrast light theme for the main content area will create a 'Control Room' utility feel. Data is prioritized over decoration.

rules: No generic sans (Inter/Roboto) for headings. Never.
All tabular data (Currency, IDs, Dates, Phone numbers) MUST use the font-mono (JetBrains Mono) for vertical alignment.
Overlines for filters and categories must be tiny, uppercase, and widely spaced.

layout_and_spacing.page_structure: Mobile-first, but optimized for POS tablets/desktops. Sidebar (existing dark) + Main Area (light). Main Area has generous padding (p-6 to p-12).
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized.

summary_bar.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8
summary_bar.surface: Grid Borders: Flat white backgrounds with sharp 1px borders (border-zinc-200), no shadows, rounded-none or rounded-sm max.

table_container.classes: w-full overflow-auto border border-zinc-200 bg-white rounded-sm

tabs.customization: Do not use pill-shaped tabs. Use 'Architectural Underline' style. border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-zinc-300 data-[state=active]:border-zinc-950 data-[state=active]:text-zinc-950 text-zinc-500 font-medium pb-2 transition-colors.

filters.customization: Flat inputs. border border-zinc-200 bg-white rounded-sm text-sm hover:border-zinc-400 focus:border-zinc-950 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-950. No soft shadows.
filters.disabled_state: For missing endpoints (Channel/Platform on most tabs): Render Select as disabled (opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed). Wrap in Shadcn Tooltip displaying 'Coming soon'.

filter_tags.description: Removable active filters below the filter bar.
filter_tags.customization: Shadcn Badge + Phosphor X icon. bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors px-2 py-1 flex items-center gap-1 rounded-sm.

table.customization: Shadcn Table. Flat rows. hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer (for drill-down). Text left-aligned. Currency/Amount column right-aligned using tabular-nums.
table.empty_data_handling: If columns like 'table_no' or 'waiter' are missing (e.g., Credit tab), render '—' gracefully in text-zinc-400.

sheet_drill_down.description: Side panel for order item details
sheet_drill_down.surface: Glassmorphism 'Crystal' Variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-l border-zinc-200 shadow-2xl. It must feel like a premium overlay, not a basic white box.
sheet_drill_down.content: Header: Order # and Status Badge. Body: Item-level breakdown list with variation/add-ons in text-xs text-zinc-500. Bottom: Sticky totals section.

buttons.export: Ghost or Outline variant. border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-950 text-sm flex items-center gap-2 rounded-sm.

empty.visuals: Phosphor Receipt icon (size 48, text-zinc-300), heading 'No orders found', subtitle 'Try adjusting your filters or date range.' text-zinc-500.

loading.customization: Use sharp rectangles (rounded-sm), avoid generic rounded-full pills. Animate pulse subtly.

icons.instructions: Use 'Regular' weight for standard icons. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
icons.usage: Use for tab icons, export buttons, filter dropdown carets, and the empty state.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

default_avatar.description: Default grayscale avatar silhouette for displaying waiter or customer profiles in the side sheet if photo is needed.

specific_ux_fixes.aggregator_tab: Display Zomato/Swiggy UI badges (pure CSS, no images) next to the Order # in the table. Inside the drill-down sheet, prominently display Rider Info and Customer Delivery Address.
specific_ux_fixes.cancelled_tab: Inside the drill-down sheet, prominently display Cancel Reason, Cancel Type (Pre/Post Serve), and Cancelled By in a red-tinted alert box (bg-red-50 text-red-900 border border-red-200) at the top.
specific_ux_fixes.credit_tab: Table must prioritize Customer Contact Info. Add 'Customer' column with Name and Phone Number prominently displayed in JetBrains Mono.
specific_ux_fixes.hold_tab: Even though backend returns Paid data (bug), keep the UX clean. Add a subtle informational Tooltip or Alert: 'Note: Displaying provisional hold data.'
specific_ux_fixes.merged_room_tabs: Treat visually identical to Paid, but use their specific primary status colors for the detail sheet badge to differentiate context.
